about: Underside aircraft sprites for OVERHEAD. Each SVG is nose-up, centred, transparent, on a 240x240 viewBox so the engine can rotate it by ground track and scale it by slant distance. Nav lights: red=port(left), green=starboard(right), white=tail, red beacon=belly.
relScaleNote: relScale = real length relative to the 777, but floored so small types stay legible on a ceiling (a true Cessna would be ~0.11). Use as a per-type size multiplier on top of the existing distance scaling.

types.label: Narrowbody twin-jet
types.matches: A320 / 737 family; the default for airliners
